title: hedeoma gracilis
intro: Hedeoma gracilis, commonly known as narrow-leaved pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic qualities. The health benefits of Hedeoma gracilis include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of fever and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Hedeoma gracilis include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with carrier oils for external use.
